headline: Batteries Beat the S&P 500: BATT Is Up 25% While SPY Hugs 11%
summary: The headline number you may have seen is generous. Through the close on June 10, 2026, the Amplify Lithium & Battery Technology ETF (NYSEARCA:BATT) is up about 10% year to date, while the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (NYSEARCA:SPY) has returned about 6%. That is a real gap, though smaller than the 25 versus 11 ... Batteries Beat the S&P 500: BATT Is Up 25% While SPY Hugs 11%
